name: Thread-first hourly task judgment
definitionOfDone: Hourly LINE task judgment loads same-conversation context before judging messages
Conversation master project assignment or context-derived project inference is used before generic text guessing
Assistant operation commands and setup/background messages do not create total-control tasks
Active related tasks are searched before task creation
Archived, completed, cancelled, or deprecated tasks are not selected as active matches
Project-specific topic patterns can require contextual matching and bypass generic keyword matching
Duplicate candidates created in the same run are merged into one task
Evidence is recorded when an existing task is updated
Dry-run verification demonstrates update-vs-create behavior for at least one project-local conversation thread
